mechanism_narrative: A rising FEDFUNDS path tightens financial conditions and lifts expected policy rates, pushing the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 20 trading days as markets reprice the near-term rate path.
failure_condition: Rejected if 20-day Treasury yield changes are not positive on average after FEDFUNDS increases, or if the sign accuracy falls below 55% in a rolling 3-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL is accelerating while FEDFUNDS remains below inflation, real policy rates fall and term premium pressure builds; this should lift the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation rises above FEDFUNDS by at least 100 bps
failure_condition: Rejected if the triggered instances do not show positive 20-day Treasury yield moves more than 60% of the time, or if the average move is not above zero.

mechanism_narrative: A falling UNRATE signals tighter labor markets and firmer wage pressure, which raises expected inflation and policy persistence, lifting the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rejected if UNRATE declines are followed by negative 20-day Treasury yield changes more often than positive ones over a rolling 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in RSAFS indicates weakening nominal demand and lower inflation pressure, causing investors to buy duration and push the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rejected if RSAFS contractions are not followed by lower 20-day Treasury yields in at least 55% of triggered cases, or if the mean yield change is positive.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous slowdown in INDPRO and HOUST signals weakening real activity and reduced financing demand, which should pull the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rejected if joint declines in INDPRO and HOUST do not coincide with lower 60-day Treasury yields, or if the conditional sign accuracy is below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in GDPC1 indicates softer aggregate demand and weaker future inflation expectations, leading to lower 10-year Treasury yields over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rejected if quarterly GDPC1 downturns are followed by positive 60-day Treasury yield changes more often than negative ones across historical releases.

mechanism_narrative: If PAYEMS is rising while UNRATE is flat or falling, labor demand remains strong enough to keep inflation and policy expectations elevated, which should push the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average rises and UNRATE does not rise by 0.1pp
failure_condition: Rejected if the joint labor-strength condition fails to predict positive 5-day yield moves in at least 55% of occurrences, or if the average yield response is negative.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-shock recovery, a low but rising FEDFUNDS rate alongside stabilizing CPIAUCSL supports expectations of continued normalization rather than recession, which should keep the 10-year Treasury yield drifting higher over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rejected if periods with stable inflation and rising FEDFUNDS do not produce positive 60-day yield changes on average, or if the sign hit rate stays below 50%.
